name: HCM IV Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted corporation on September5, 2025, as MercatorI Acquisition Corp. as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this Report as our initial business combination. On October 29, 2025, we changed our name ...
